Unwavering dedication. For our customers.
Our commitment to excellence directly impacts your success. We pride ourselves on delivering unparalleled solutions and support that empower your business to thrive.
Standby Power Systems
Given the inherent instability of power systems and grids, a rapidly growing business recognized the necessity for expansion across various key regions. UNIS promptly extended its services into three major markets, allowing this formidable megawatt industry leader to concentrate on its core manufacturing operations.
Top 250 Household Goods MFG
A major household appliances and kitchenware manufacturer experienced such rapid growth that they found it challenging to keep pace with their increasing demands. Turning to UNIS for a solution, they required an additional 600,000 square feet of distribution space. Today, UNIS efficiently fulfills orders for their largest big box clients, ensuring smooth operations for this thriving business.
Supply chain management that fits your business
Partnering with us means more than just a business relationship. It's an opportunity to unlock a world of value-added services that will enhance your operations and elevate your success.
E-commerce
Has your business always been or is transforming to a larger percentage of orders going B2C? Our proprietary WMS makes sure your order fulfillment is done same day and right every time.
B2B

about.text:
About UNIS: Leading 3PL Logistics & Supply Chain Solutions
Rate Notice: 5.9% general rate increase Jan 1, 2026 — Learn More
About UNIS: Revolutionizing Global Logistics & Supply Chain Solutions
Our Mission
Unify supply chains with advanced technology and services
Founded in 1989
12 million+ sq ft of space
1,200+ customers
Who We Are
First and foremost,
UNIS is an asset-based 3PL fulfillment and transportation company.
Founded in 1989, UNIS LLC has grown into a majority, nationally recognized Third-Party Logistics Provider (3PL).
From humble beginnings with just a few trucks operating in Southern California, UNIS has expanded into all major US markets.
UNIS has impacted the successful flow of commerce with superior technology, smarter supply chains, and faster execution.
We credit our growth to an agile, customer-driven mindset, and strategic investments in technologies that give our clients the visibility and operational insights they require in today's dynamic supply chain environment.
We do what's best.
For you.
Leading the industry
towards a more unified future.
Putting our customers first. Every step of the journey.
Seeking effective solutions in everything we pursue.
Building successful flows of commerce with precision.
We grow through your success.
Delivering 100 million E-commerce and retail orders every year.
Ensuring seamless deliveries and unparalleled experiences for 200+ consumer accounts.
Leading the industry with 12 million feet of accessible warehouse space.
Shifting paradigms with innovative inventory management.
We are a team of visionaries.
James Lin
CEO
Scott Simanek
CCO
Tom Yu
CIO
Let's Connect,
learn more about UNIS.
